title: Bundle Multipack - Munch & Crunch Meaty Rolls Snacks for Dogs - 3 x 300g Dog Biscuit Treats Meaty Bites - Made in UK Complimentary Dry Food for Dogs - With a Kerhoot Happy & Healthy Dog Care Booklet
features: MULTIPACK DOG TREATS - Three 300g Bags of Munch & Crunch Beef Rolls- 900 grams Tasty Biscuits Feed As A Treat Reward Or Training Aid - Plus A Kerhoot Dog Care Booklet - 4 Items Pack
BEEF DOG BISCUITS - Best Dog Treats Munch & Crunch Health Liver Biscuit Shapes Bites Taste Great Dogs LOVE Them - Ideal For Training Young Dogs And Rewarding Good Behaviour.
WITH ADDED VITAMINS - Crunchy Dog Biscuits Treats | Filled With a Tasty Center That Dogs Adore i Ideal To Keep A Few In Your Pocket As A Reward Or Treat On Walks.
TRADITIONAL DOG BISCUITS - Delicious Combination Of Light Biscuit With a Tasty Beef Marrowbone Meaty Centre. Perfect For Rewards ot Training

ALSO INCLUDED - A 16 Page Colour Booklet Packed With Great Information About Everyday Dog Care. This Glossy Booklet Has Both Pictures and Text Offering Lots Of Great Advice About Feeding And General Day To Day Dog Care Information. You Can Keep It And Refer Back To It Whenever You May Need It.
description: Product description 4 ITEM BUNDLE PACK - 3 x 300g Packs of Munch & Crunch Meaty Marrowbone Rolls Crunchy biscuit treats your dog will love - Ideal for training PLUS 1 16 page Dog Care Booklet - FOUR Items In Total - MADE IN UK MULTIPACK 900 grams Perfect snack or treat. Dogs of all ages love these beef marrowbone style rolls. Healthy Treats For Dogs With vitamins A , D3 & E Protein Fibre and Oil these dog snacks are just perfect for your pampered pooch. Feeding Guide Feeding advice for a small dog (5KG) feed 5 biscuits a day. Medium dogs (15KG) feed 12 biscuits a day. Large Dogs (30KG) feed 20 biscuits a day. Also Included One Kerhoot dog care booklet with hints and tips on general dog care. Indications Snacks for Dogs Ingredients Beef Centre Directions Feed as a treat alongside your pets normal diet See more
